title: Time Loop Mod (aka. iForgotMyPills)
description:
this is a mod that plays back whatever you did every 5 minutes. 
it works with the Mocap mod by mt1006 and is designed to execute commands for that.
body:
## this mod executes commands for Mocap mod, by mt1006.
### main features:

**- Records almost everything you did for the past 5 or 10 minutes, and plays the recordings back. download which version you want from the versions tab.**

**- Supports leaving the world and rejoining (will start a new recording)**

**- Supports changing dimensions**

**- YOU NEED TO NOT DIE. i'll make it support that later**
(apparently, mt1006 is working on a fix for this.)

**-doesn't work with multiplayer properly yet**

while you play survival, or speedrun the game, you will be able to see your past self grinding.

note1: your progress will reset at the start of each recording, so your past self will be able to do exactly whatever you did.

### please report issues either on discord @.memo_ or on github.

## MOTION CAPTURE MOD BY mt1006: [Motion Capture](https://modrinth.com/mod/motion-capture)
## this mod is a scalable version of Tombino's datapack from [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i602-oh0a0c).

## I AM NOT WORKING ON THIS MOD ANYMORE. Luigi and VLTNO seem to pay much more attention to [their mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeloop) than I do to mine, so please check out their mod. (modrinth.com/mod/timeloop)
